name: Smartsupp Live Chat and Visitor Recording API
what_it_does: Live chat and visitor recording platform with REST API — providing real-time website visitor chat, session recording for visitor behavior understanding, chatbot automation, e-commerce integration (Shopify, WooCommerce), and team inbox management for SMB customer support and sales teams.
use_cases: Integrating Smartsupp live chat widget into websites and e-commerce stores
Accessing visitor session recording data for UX research and conversion optimization
Managing Smartsupp conversations and visitor data via REST API
Setting up chatbot flows for automated customer support via Smartsupp
Integrating Smartsupp with CRM and helpdesk systems via API for unified customer view
not_for: Enterprise contact center (use Genesys or Salesforce Service Cloud for enterprise CX)
Advanced analytics without live chat (use FullStory or Hotjar for pure analytics)
High-volume automated customer support (use Intercom or Zendesk for scale)
best_when: A small to mid-size e-commerce or SaaS business needs affordable live chat with built-in visitor session recording — combining support chat and UX research in one tool at a fraction of separate tool costs.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-grade contact center features, sophisticated chatbot AI, or high-volume support operations beyond what SMB-grade tools handle.

auth.notes: API key from Smartsupp account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for conversation events (new message, conversation opened/closed). JavaScript chat widget installed on website. Chatbot configured in Smartsupp dashboard. CRM integrations via native connectors or API. No OAuth2.

pricing.notes: Czech company (Brno). Founded 2013. Raised €1M. Profitable bootstrapped company. Central European startup with 58,000+ active businesses. Visitor recording as standard feature (not add-on like Intercom) is key differentiator for e-commerce. Integration with WooCommerce, Shopify, Magento, PrestaShop. Czech privacy law compliance. GDPR-compliant visitor recording with IP anonymization.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for conversations, visitors, agents, and messages. API key auth. Good documentation for SMB use cases. JavaScript widget for chat and recording. Webhook for conversation events. Chatbot configuration via dashboard. Session recording data access via Smartsupp dashboard (not API). E-commerce integrations via native plugins.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Conversation reads idempotent. Visitor reads idempotent. Message sends not idempotent — use conversation ID for tracking.
known_agent_gotchas: Session recording data available via dashboard only — not exportable via REST API
ePrivacy Directive: visitor session recording requires explicit consent in EU
GDPR: visitor session data is PII — 30-day default retention; configure per policy
Free tier limited to 100 conversations/month — quickly exceeded for active support
Czech company with EU data residency — strong GDPR compliance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and ePrivacy compliant. EU data residency (Czech Republic). API key auth. Session recording captures visitor behavior including potentially sensitive form inputs — configure field masking for sensitive inputs (passwords, payment). GDPR consent required for session recording in EU/EEA. Visitor chat data is PII — apply appropriate retention policies.
